metadata.description: Portable project-level goal-orientation, anti-drift, and lightweight domain-modeling system for AI coding agents.

runtimeRequirements.note: Zero runtime dependencies. Pure markdown + protocols executed by the agent. Works on Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: lodestar
plugins.description: Project anchor layer (Mode/Goal/Domain/State/GAP/Decision/Action) with opt-in lifecycle hooks and task-skill bridge.
